free_text: Excitation functions of proton-induced reactions on
natural Nd and production of radionuclides relevant
for double beta decay: Completing measurement in
Experimental technique, Nd+p data at 10-30 MeV.
degraded by Cu foils placed between Nd and Ti foils
2 hours irradiation for the energies 5-10 MeV,
1 hour irradiation for the energies 30-35 MeV
Four natural Nd targets (99.9% purity, 10x10 mm2,
Thinner Nd targets (99.9% purity, 10x10 mm2 area,
Quadarture sum of uncertainties due to
VS. EDEG moved from INC-SPECT to METHOD.
